MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
KIMBERLY A. BLISS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE PLAIANTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, FRINA NEMCHENOK

JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)
